global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with prominent text and call-to-action elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging viewers to stream content with a free trial.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: A rectangular area at the top contains the text 'BingeLayer' in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Stream the hype' is prominently displayed in a large, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Sub-message text
elements.description: The phrase 'Start free today' appears below the main message in a slightly smaller font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button at the bottom features the text 'Learn more' in a clear, inviting style.

elements.label: Decorative shapes
elements.description: Several abstract shapes are scattered throughout the ad, adding visual interest without specific meaning.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: More geometric shapes are present, contributing to the overall design without defining a clear subject.

elements.label: Small circles
elements.description: A few small circles are positioned in the center, enhancing the decorative aspect of the ad.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A larger rectangular shape is included, adding depth to the visual layout.

elements.label: Lower shape
elements.description: A vertical shape at the bottom adds to the layered effect of the design.

elements.label: Side shape
elements.description: A narrow vertical shape on the left side complements the overall composition.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Stream the hype Start free today' is prominently displayed in a large, eye-catching font.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype Start free today

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A small button at the bottom right features the text 'Learn more' in a clear, inviting style.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: A small logo area at the top left contains the text 'BingeLayer' in a bold, modern font.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bold and modern, key elements include a logo, main message, and CTA.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Stream the hype, Start free today, Learn more, BingeLayer
